articles.title_en: TASS: near Kharkov, Ukrainian guardianship kidnapped three children of the Ukrainian Armed Forces
articles.lead_en: The soldier is sure that his sons and daughter were taken “for experiments,” Russian law enforcement agencies said

articles.lead_raw: Солдат уверен, что его сыновей и дочь забрали "на опыты", рассказали в российских силовых структурах

articles.title_en: Wagenknecht: German industry needs energy from Russia
articles.lead_en: The founder of the BSW party believes that it is necessary to purchase oil and gas “where the supply is cheapest”

articles.title_en: Peskov called Britain's lifting of part of the sanctions on fuel from Russian oil pragmatism
articles.lead_en: Such situations, when they concern interpersonal communication, are called cynicism, the Kremlin representative noted
articles.title_raw: Песков назвал прагматизмом отмену Британией части санкций на топливо из нефти РФ
articles.lead_raw: Подобные ситуации, когда они касаются межчеловеческого общения, называются цинизмом, отметил представитель Кремля

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit oil refining and energy facilities used in the interests of the Armed Forces of Ukraine

articles.title_en: Rubio: the issue of Russian oil supplies to India will not be a prominent topic on the agenda
articles.lead_en: The US Secretary of State noted that the issue of Russian oil purchases did not directly concern New Delhi

articles.title_en: Medvedev pointed out the inevitability of Armenia's transition to European gas prices
articles.lead_en: If Yerevan continues its course of rapprochement with the EU, it will not be possible to remain a member of the EAEU, noted the Deputy Head of the Russian Security Council
articles.title_raw: Медведев указал на неизбежность перехода Армении на европейские цены на газ
articles.lead_raw: Если Ереван продолжит свой курс сближения с ЕС, оставаться членом ЕАЭС не получится, отметил замглавы Совбеза РФ
